attachment_text: State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that "In exercise of the powers conferred by section 5(3) of State Bank Of India Act, 1955, the Central Government has accorded sanction to increase issued capital of the Bank from the existing Rs. 526.30 crore to Rs. 650.00 crore through Rights Issue".
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended September 30,2010.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended March 31,2011.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended September 30,2011.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results with Limited Review Report for the period ended December 31,2011.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended March 31,2012.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results along with the Limited Review Report for the period ended June 30,2012.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended September 30,2012.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that Bank has revised the Base Rate by 5 bps from 9.75% p.a. to 9.70% p. a. and Benchmark Prime Lending Rate by 5 bps from 14.50% p.a. to 14.45% p.a. effective from February 04, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (e) of Section (19) of the State Bank of India Act 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, vide its notification dated February 04, 2013, has nominated Shri Rajiv Takru, Secretary, Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance, to be a Director on the Central Board of Directors of State Bank of India with immediate effect and until further orders vice Shri D. K. Mittal.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (f) of Section (19) of the State Bank of India Act, 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, vide its notification dated. February 06, 2013, has nominated Dr. Urjit R. Patel, Deputy Governor, Reserve Bank of India, to be a Director on the Central Board of Directors of State Bank of India with immediate effect and until further orders vice Dr. Subir Vithal Gokarn.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended December 31,2012.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that a General Meeting of the Shareholders of the Bank will be held on March 18, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that UFBU has decided to support and join the call for nationwide strike, on the February 20, 2013 and February 21, 2013 given by Central Trade Unions. All India State Bank Officers Federation and All India State Bank of India Staff Federation being part of UFBU will also participate in said strike.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Company has fixed Record Date as March 16, 2013 for the purpose of payment of interest on Public Issue of Bonds for series N1, N2, N3, N4, N5 and N6.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding the outcome of the meeting of Executive Committee of the Central Board of the Bank held on February 23, 2013.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange vide letter dated February 27, 2013 regarding the Revision in Interest Rate of Retail Term Deposits.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that SBI has decided to revise the interest rates on NRE/NRO Deposits for the tenors of "1 year and up to 10 years" to 8.75% p.a. from 8.50% (earlier) with effect from March 01, 2013.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of the Special Resolution passed by Shareholders in General Meeting held on March 18, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding the details of Voting result at the General Meeting of the Bank, pursuant to clause 35A and Extracts of the Minutes of the proceedings of the General Meeting of the Shareholders of the Bank was held on March 18, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Executive Committee of the Central Board of the Bank, in its Meeting held on March 20, 2013, has approved the issuance and allotment of 1,29,88,697 (One Crore Twenty-nine Lac Eighty-eight Thousand Six Hundred Ninety-seven) Equity Shares at an Issue Price of Rs.2,312.78 (Rs. Two Thousand Three Hundred Twelve and paise Seventy Eight Only) per share (face value Rs. 10/- each, at a premium of Rs.2,302.78 per share), to Gol by way of preferential allotment.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that Shri T. S. Krishnaswamy, has been posted as General Manager (Compliance) and Compliance Officer of the Bank vice Shri Shyamal sinha .
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding appointment of Statutory Central Auditors 2012-13.

State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange vide its letter dated April 04, 2013 a copy of disclosure pursuant to Regulation 13(4A) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 1992.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Bank has concluded the issue of USD 1,000 Mio Fixed Rate Senior Unsecured Notes having a maturity of 5 years at a coupon of 3.25% p.a. payable semi-annually, under a standalone bond issue under Rule 144A/Regulation-S of US Securities Exchange Commission (SEC), in the form of 144A/Regulation-S Notes. The Bonds will be issued through its London branch as of April 18, 2013 and shall be listed on Singapore Stock Exchange (SGX).

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Register of shareholders of the Bank will be closed for transfer of shares from May 30, 2013 to June 3, 2013 (both days inclusive) for the purpose of payment of dividend, if any, for the accounting year 2012-13. The proposal for declaration of dividend, if any, for the accounting year 2012-13 will be considered by the Central Board of the Bank at its Meeting scheduled to be held on May 23, 2013.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of notice of the Annual General Meeting of shareholders of the Bank to be held on June 21, 2013.
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended March 31,2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange vide its letter dated May 23, 2013 that the date of payment of the Dividend is fixed as June 17, 2013 and the dividend warrants will be payable, in India, at par at all branches of State Bank of India, irrespective of the amount.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Central Board of the Bank at its meeting held on May 23, 2013, inter alia, has declared a Dividend of Rs. 41.50 per share (415%) for the accounting year ended March 31 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that it has been decided to revise downwards by 25 bps the interest rate on Bulk Deposits ( Rs. One Crore and above) for the tenors 7 days to less than 1 year. Accordingly, the interest rate for bulk deposits for the above tenors will be 7.25% per annum with effect from June 07, 2013.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of notice of the Annual General Meeting of the Company to be held on June 21, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of Section (19) and sub-section (1) of section 20 of the State Bank of India Act, 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, after consultation with Reserve Bank of India, has appointed Smt. Arundhati Bhattacharya, as Managing Director, State Bank of India from the date (August 02, 2013) of taking over charge of the post and upto March 31, 2016 i.e. the date of her attaining the age of superannuation or until further orders, whichever is earlier.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that consequent upon the appointment of Smt. Arundhati Bhattacharya as Managing Director of the Bank, as advised in Company's letter dated August 03, 2013, it has now been decided to designate Smt. Bhattacharya, as the Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer (CFO), vice Shri Diwakar Gupta (who has since retired on superannuation).
State Bank of India has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results along with the Limited Review Report for the period ended June 30,2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the interest rate for bulk deposits for the tenors 7 days to 60 days will be 9% per annum and for the tenor 61 days to less than one year will be 8.25% per annum with effect from August 31, 2013.

Life Insurance Corporation Of India has submitted to the Exchange vide letter dated August 29, 2013 a copy of disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the  Bank has acquired 23% shares of Bank State Bank of India, Indonesia (BSBII) in a recent deal with P. T. Ravindo Jaya. The Present Shareholding of BSBII is as under :State Bank of India : 99%, P. T. Ravindo Jaya : 01%".

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the power conferred by clause (d) of Section 19 of the State Bank of India Act, 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, in consultation with Reserve Bank of India, vide Gazette Notification No. F 6/30/2013-BO-I dated the August 29, 2013, nominated Shri Tribhuwan Nath Chaturvedi (DoB:15-01-1959), as part-time Non-official Director on the Central Board of Directors of State Bank Of India, for a period of three years.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange vide letter dated September 18, 2013 that the Bank has decided to revise upwards the rates.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Bank wishes to announce the repurchase of principal amount of US$147,000,000 (the "Repurchase") of US$1,000,000,000 3.25 per cent bonds due 2018 (the "2018 bonds"). The 2018 Bonds were issued by State Bank of India on 18 April 2013 and are listed on the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited. The Repurchase of the Bond took place between August 26, 2013 and September 26, 2013. The Bank is in th process of cancelling the repurchased 2018 Bonds and the aggregate outstanding principal amount of the 2018 Bonds following such cancellation will be US$853,000,000. None of the Directors or the controlling shareholder of SBI have any interest, direct or indirect, in the Repurchase.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange vide letter dated October 01, 2013 regarding Board level changes.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section (19) and Sub-Section (1) of section 20 of the State Bank of India Act, 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, has appointed Smt. Arundhati Bhattacharya, Managing Director, State Bank of India as Chairman, State Bank of India, for a period of three years from the date of her taking over the charge of the post i.e. October 07, 2013, or until further orders, whichever is earlier.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding revision of interest rate on bulk deposits.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that it has been decided to designate Shri Rajendra Kumar Saraf as the Deputy Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the Bank.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Central Board of the Bank, in its Meeting held on October 30, 2013, has approved, subject to the approvals from RBI and GoI under section 5(2) of the State Bank of India Act, the infusion of Capital funds to the tune of Rs. 2000 Crore (Rupees Two Thousand Crores) in the State Bank of India by way of preferential allotment of equity shares in favour of the Government of India.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that it has been decided to revise the interest rates on Bulk & Retail Term Deposits, effective from November 01, 2013.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding revision in Base Rate & BPLR with effect from November 07, 2013.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the exchange the standalone & consolidated financial results for the period ended 30-sep-2013.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of notice of General Meeting of the Shareholders of the Bank to be held on December 30, 2013.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Government of India (GoI), on December 09, 2013, has accorded its approval to SBI:    1. To raise Rs. 9,576 crores of equity during the financial year 2013-14 from the market by way of Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) as per law with the condition that the Gol holding shall not come down below 58%; and    2. To increase its  "Issued Capital"  by Rs. 11,576 crores [Rs. 2,000 crores (including premium) towards preferential allotment of equity shares in favour of Gol and Rs. 9,576 crores (including premium) towards raising of equity from the market] in accordance with Section 5(2) of SBI Act, 1955, subject to requisite approvals.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Executive Committee of Central Board (ECCB) of the Bank, in its meeting held on December 12, 2013, has accorded its approval to fix the Issue Price at Rs. 1782.74 (Rupees One thousand seven hundred eighty two and paisa seventy four only) per share of face value of Rs.10/-, including a premium of Rs. 1772.74 per share, and accordingly, to issue 1,12,18,685 equity shares, ranking pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Bank in all respects, on preferential basis to Gol, for a consideration of Rs. 1,999,99,98,496.90 (Rupees One thousand nine hundred ninety nine crores ninety nine lacs ninety eight thousand four hundred ninety six and paisa ninety only).  The price for preferential issue has been arrived at in accordance with the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2009, taking into consideration November 29, 2013 as the relevant date.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that UFBU has given a notice to IBA calling for nationwide Bank strike, on December 18, 2013. All India State Bank Officers' Federation and All India State Bank of India Staff Federation being part of UFBU will also participate in the said strike. Since the call is for nationwide All-bank strike, our Bank will not be separately impacted, if the strike materialises.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of Section (19) and Sub-Section (1) of Section 20 of the State Bank of India Act 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government , has appointed Shri P. Pradeep Kumar, Deputy Managing Director, State Bank of India, as Managing Director, State Bank of India, from the date of taking over the charge of the post and upto October 31, 2015  i.e. the date of his attaining the age of superannuation or until further orders, whichever is earlier.

State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of extracts of the Minutes of the Proceeding of the General Meeting of the Shareholders of the Bank held on December 30, 2013 along with a copy of the details of voting results of the General Meeting, pursuant to Clause 35A.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding Preferential Issue to GoI - Allotment of shares.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding Qualified institutions placement of equity shares of face value of Rs. 10 each (the "Equity Shares ") of State Bank of India (the "Bank") under Chapter VIII of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations. 2009, as amended (the "ICDR Regulations ") (the "QIP").

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in respect of the issue of Equity Shares to Qualified Institutional Buyers in terms of Chapter VIII of the ICDR Regulations, the duly authorized Committee of Directors of the Bank for the QIP (the  Committee ) has, in its meeting held on February 03, 2014, decided to issue and allot 5,13,20,436 Equity shares at a price of Rs.1565 per Equity Share (including a premium of Rs.1555 per Equity Share), aggregating Rs. 80,31,64,82,340 (Rupees Eight thousand thirty one crores sixty four lacs eighty two thousand three hundred forty only).

attachment_text: Life Insurance corporation of India has submitted to the Exchange vide letter dated February 06, 2014 a copy of disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 along with a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 13(3) and 13(6) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 1992.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the exchange the standalone & consolidated financial results for the period ended 31-dec-2013.
State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that it has been decided to revise the interest rates on NRE/NRO Term Deposits, effective from February 18, 2014.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Company has fixed Record Date as March 16, 2014 for the purpose of interest payment on Public Issue of Bonds. The Yearly interest payment for the year ended March 31, 2014 is due to the Bondholders on April 02, 2014. (ISIN: INE062A08017, INE062A08025, INE062A08033, INE062A08041, INE062A08058, INE062A08066.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Central Board of the Bank, at its Meeting held on March 03, 2014, has declared an Interim Dividend at the rate of Rs. 15 per equity share of Rs. 10 each (i.e. 150%), for FY 2013-14. The date of payment of the Interim Dividend is fixed as April 02, 2014 and the dividend warrants will be payable, in India, at par at all branches of State Bank of India, irrespective of the amount.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Register of shareholders of the Bank will be closed for transfer of shares from March 13, 2014 to March 17, 2014 (both days inclusive) for payment of dividend for FY 2013-14.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in terms of Section 41, sub section ( 1) of the State Bank of India Act, 1955, RBI has approved appointment of the 14 Statutory Central Auditors  (SCAs) for the year 2013-14 , who shall hold office until the next Annual General Meeting of the Bank.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (e) of Section 19 of the State Bank of India Act, 1955 (23 of 1955), the Central Government, vide its notification No. 7/2/2012-BO-l dated April 01, 2014, has nominated Shri Gurdial Singh Sandhu, Secretary, Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance, to be a Director on the Central Board of Directors of State Bank of India with immediate effect and until further orders vice Shri Rajiv Takru.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that State Bank of India ("SBI") has priced on April 10, 2014 and will issue USD 1,250 million unsecured fixed rate notes (the  Notes ) in two tranches of USD 750 million having a maturity of 5 years at a coupon of 3.622 percent payable semi-annually and USD 500 million having a maturity of 10 years at a coupon of 4.875 percent payable semi-annually, pursuant to a standalone issue under Rule 144A / Regulation S of the U.S. Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the "Securities Act"). The Notes will be issued through the London branch of SBI and shall be listed on Singapore Stock Exchange Securities Trading Limited.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that Shri Hemant G. Contractor and Shri S. Vishvanathan, Managing Directors appointed under Section 19(b) of the SBI Act, ceased to be Directors on the Bank's Central Board, as at the close of business on April 30, 2014.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Annual General Meeting of the shareholders of the Bank will be held on June 25, 2014. Further, the Register of Shareholders of the Bank will be closed from May 31, 2014 to June 04, 2014 (both days inclusive) for payment of dividend, if any, to be considered at the Meeting of Central Board of the Bank, scheduled to be held on May 23, 2014.
State Bank Of India has submitted to the exchange the standalone & consolidated financial results for the period ended 31-Mar-2014.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the Central Board of the Bank at its meeting held on May 23, 2014 has declared a Dividend of Rs. 30 per share (300%) for the accounting year ended March 31 2014. The Dividend so declared includes the Interim Dividend, already declared, at the rate of Rs.15 per equity share of Rs.10 each (i.e.150%) and paid on April 02, 2014.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that  The date of final payment of the Dividend is fixed as June 19, 2014 and the dividend warrants will be payable, in India, at par at all branches of State Bank of India, irrespective of the amount.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that that the Central Board of the Bank, in its meeting held on May 23, 2014, has accepted the resignation tendered by Shri Deepak Ishwarbhai Amin, from the position of Director on the Bank s Central Board with effect from the close of business on May 08, 2014.

News Verification : The media had reports that . "SBI to merge five subsidiary banks with itself as it prepares to fund the economy". The Exchange, in order to verify the accuracy or otherwise of the information reported in the media and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company.  has vide its letter inter-alia stated," We clarify that no such proposal has been formally taken up for approval. While the Bank has always had plans to consider merger of the Associate Banks, eventually, a position which has been stated by the Bank from time to time since long, the matter had not been under active consideration for quite some time. Going forward, the Bank may examine the merger options afresh, when considered appropriate, but preparation of a possible roadmap would take few months."

State Bank Of India has submitted to the Exchange a copy of the notice being issued in connection with the election of Shareholders Directors in terms of the Section 19(C) of the State Bank of India Act, 1955.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding an outcome of the General Meeting of Shareholders held on June 25, 2014 as per 35A of the Listing Agreement. Further the Company has also submitted a copy of extracts of the minutes of the proceedings of the General Meeting of the Shareholders of the Bank held on June 25, 2014.

State Bank Of India has informed the Exchange that the following four Directors have been Elected as Shareholders' Directors in terms of the Section 19 (c) of the State Bank of India Act, 1955, with effect from June 26, 1014:  1. Shri Sunil Mehta  2. Shri Deepak I. Amin  3. Shri Sanjiv Malhotra  4. Shri Mangalore Devdas Mallya
